contract.per_candidate_bound: O(p^4 + t^3) for every positive integer p,t
primary_acceptance: Independently reconstruct the bound from every executable loop and matrix operation.
Use O(p) synthetic division for each excluded factor so A K(Z,X) is O(t p^2), not O(t p^3).
Show algebraically that every lower-order mixed term is bounded by O(p^4+t^3).
Confirm the efficient source contains no 2^p allocation.
corroboration_only: Efficient and explicit EIG agree to <=1e-7 for p=3..9 and three seeds.
The synthetic-division implementation matches explicit factor exclusion.
contract.negative_control: A 0.1% EIG corruption must produce a nonzero verifier exit.
